title: Chocolate Fondue
ingredients: 2 2/3 cups finely chopped semi-sweet or dark chocolate
instructions: In a saucepan, slowly heat whipping cream until bubbles form around the edge of the pan.
Remove from heat and whisk in chopped chocolate until mixture is smooth.
Transfer mixture to a fondue pot and keep warm over low heat.
Serve with berries, bananas, cookies, and cake cubes.
notes: Use good quality chocolate and avoid using chocolate chips
Traditionally enjoyed on New Year's Eve
